Test Description: Tap header back icon.
Expected Output: Closes PDF viewer and returns back to course syllabus.

Test Description: Load a PDF that has already been loaded, while device is offline.
Pre-conditions: PDF was previously loaded, device is offline.
Expected Output: PDF loads instantly from local application directory cache without showing load error.

Test Description: Tap 'Start Exam' after reviewing rules and time limit description.
Pre-conditions: Exam detail description screen is open.
Expected Output: Exam questions page initializes, and exam countdown timer starts.

Test Description: Tap an answer choice on an exam question.
Expected Output: Option circle fills in to denote active selection.

Test Description: Tap the device hardware back button or top-left back icon during active exam.
Pre-conditions: Exam is in progress with countdown active.
Expected Output: System displays Warning Dialog alerting 'Exam in progress. Leaving will submit current score.'

Test Description: Minimize the app or lock the screen during an active exam, then re-open it.
Expected Output: Exam session remains active; countdown timer shows correct elapsed time (does not stop).
Remarks: Checks exam lifecycle on app pause.

Test Description: Tap the 'Next Question' button.
Expected Output: Screen updates to load question 2; back button becomes active.

Test Description: Tap 'Previous' button on question 2.
Expected Output: Returns display to show question 1 with previous selected answer highlighted.

Test Description: Observe back button on first question.
Expected Output: Previous/Back navigation button is hidden or disabled on question 1.

Test Description: Tap option A, then tap option B on same question.
Expected Output: Selection indicator switches instantly to B; A clears.

Test Description: Tap 'Next' without selecting any option on question.
Expected Output: App transitions to next question safely, saving answer status as 'Unanswered'.

Test Description: Check timer countdown frequency.
Expected Output: Timer label updates text decrementing seconds value smoothly every 1000ms.

Test Description: Observe timer text color when remaining time is less than 5 minutes.
Expected Output: Timer text highlights red to warn user of critical countdown time limit.

Test Description: Allow timer to count down to 00:00.
Expected Output: App blocks inputs, displays toast 'Time is up! Submitting exam', auto-sends payload.

Test Description: Navigate to final question and tap 'Submit Exam'.
Pre-conditions: User is on last question of exam.
Expected Output: Display verification dialog prompting 'Are you sure you want to end and submit exam?'.

Test Description: Tap 'Cancel' or outside click on submit confirmation dialog.
Expected Output: Dialog closes, returns user back to final question screen (does not submit).

Test Description: Tap 'Confirm Submit' on dialog.
Expected Output: Displays loading panel, dispatches answers to database, navigates to Result Screen.

Test Description: Attempt to re-enter exam screen after completing it once (if limited to 1 attempt).
Expected Output: System alerts 'Exam already completed. Maximum attempts reached.'

Test Description: Rotate device to landscape during exam.
Expected Output: Question description text and scroll views resize without formatting overlaps.

Test Description: Minimize exam, wait past duration limit, then restore app.
Pre-conditions: Exam duration limit is 10 mins. User minimizes app at 08:00.
Expected Output: App restores directly to Result Screen showing auto-submit score from when timer ended.

Test Description: Verify equations or formatted lists display properly in question box.
Pre-conditions: Question data in DB uses HTML text format.
Expected Output: Displays parsed text formats correctly (does not display raw tags).

Test Description: Force quit app during exam, reboot app, check status.
Pre-conditions: Exam was active, app is terminated from memory tasks list.
Expected Output: Exam session is saved as incomplete/submitted automatically or allows session resume (depending on rules).

Test Description: Tap a multiple-choice option for the current quiz question.
Pre-conditions: Quiz screen is active with loaded question.
Expected Output: Tapped option is selected and highlighted; navigation action becomes available.
Remarks: Verifies local state update in Quiz.

Test Description: Let the quiz countdown timer run out to 00:00.
Pre-conditions: Quiz screen is active with a limit timer.
Expected Output: Quiz gets auto-submitted, and user is instantly navigated to Result Screen.

Test Description: Select answers for all questions and tap the 'Submit Quiz' button.
Expected Output: Confirmation dialog appears, user accepts, and quiz results display.

Test Description: Tap Next button on Quiz page.
Expected Output: Loads question 2 dynamically, back navigation button appears.

Test Description: Tap Back button on question 2.
Expected Output: Reloads question 1 showing previous selected option highlighted.

Test Description: Select option A, then change choice selection to option C.
Expected Output: Option C gets highlighted, selection highlight on A is cleared.

Test Description: Tap Next button without picking option.
Expected Output: Navigates to next question, saves question status as unanswered.

Test Description: Press device back button during quiz.
Expected Output: Warning pop dialog alerts user leaving quiz will discard progress.

Test Description: Tap cancel on exit warning dialog.
Expected Output: Dialog closes, quiz progress screen remains open.

Test Description: Tap confirm exit on quiz warning dialog.
Expected Output: Quiz progress is discarded, navigates user back to My Course Details screen.

Test Description: Verify total questions indicator text count.
Expected Output: Top header text shows 'Question 1 of 10' increments correctly (e.g. 'Question 2 of 10').

Test Description: Submit quiz while offline.
Expected Output: Quiz submission fails, loading indicators clear, error toast alerts network error.

Test Description: Retry submission after network connection recovers.
Pre-conditions: Quiz submission had failed due to offline state.
Expected Output: Quiz submits successfully, data uploads to database, result screen loads.

Test Description: Verify text spacing inside option bubble.
Pre-conditions: Quiz is active, option text is long.
Expected Output: Text scale adjusts inside bubble card bounds, text wraps cleanly.

Test Description: Check list details tag after quiz submit.
Expected Output: Quiz list index shows status badge 'Attempted' with achieved score percentage.
Remarks: Verifies state sync in dashboard list.

Test Description: Verify total score, correct, incorrect, and percentage fields.
Pre-conditions: Result screen is loaded post exam/quiz.
Expected Output: Displayed stats correspond accurately to actual quiz answers marked by user.

Test Description: Tap the 'Review Answers' button on Result screen.
Expected Output: Review page opens showing all quiz questions, user answers, and correct answers.

Test Description: Observe pass/fail tag when user score is above the passing limit.
Pre-conditions: User scored 80% when passing limit is 60%.
Expected Output: Result screen shows green badge 'PASSED' with celebratory illustration.

Test Description: Observe pass/fail tag when user score is below passing limit.
Expected Output: Result screen shows red badge 'FAILED' with failure retry suggestions.

Test Description: Tap 'Retry Quiz' button (if enabled).
Pre-conditions: User is on Result screen, has attempts remaining.
Expected Output: Quiz screen re-initializes, clearing previous states, starts timer.

Test Description: Tap back button on result page.
Expected Output: App returns user back to My Course Details screen.

Test Description: Observe score percentage format.
Expected Output: Score displays percentage (e.g. 'Score: 75%') and show absolute count (e.g. '15/20 Correct').

Test Description: On Review Answers page, verify styling of correctly answered questions.
Expected Output: Correctly answered options highlight green check.

Test Description: On Review Answers page, verify styling of incorrectly answered questions.
Expected Output: User's wrong choice highlights red cross; correct choice highlights green check.

Test Description: On Review page, check skipped questions styling.
Expected Output: Skipped question displays status 'Not Answered'; correct option is highlighted.

Test Description: Erase name input, insert an invalid email, and tap 'Update Profile'.
Expected Output: Validators flag fields displaying 'Full Name is required' and 'Enter a valid email'.

Test Description: Type a new name value and tap Update Profile.
Expected Output: Name is updated in local Hive storage, on API database; header shows updated name.

Test Description: Type a new email value and tap Update.
Expected Output: Updates email successfully; local Hive cache syncs.

Test Description: Type a new phone value and tap Update.
Expected Output: Updates phone value, database successfully stores changes.

Test Description: Tap camera icon on avatar, select Camera source, capture photo, and confirm.
Pre-conditions: Profile Screen is open, Camera permission granted.
Expected Output: Avatar image changes to captured photo, photo is uploaded successfully.

Test Description: Tap camera icon on avatar, select Gallery source, pick an image from files.
Pre-conditions: Profile Screen is open, storage permission granted.
Expected Output: Avatar image displays chosen file, image is uploaded successfully.

Test Description: Tap 'Update Profile' without modifying any field.
Pre-conditions: Profile screen open, fields match current details.
Expected Output: Validation displays success toast 'Nothing to change' without calling update API.

Test Description: Tap outside or cancel button on photo source select popup dialog.
Expected Output: Dialog closes, profile image remains unchanged.

Test Description: Tap 'Change Password' button on Profile page.
Expected Output: Change Password bottom sheet widget overlay slides up.

Test Description: Tap update password with old password input empty.
Expected Output: Validator displays 'Old password is required'.

Test Description: Type mismatching passwords in new and confirm password fields.
Expected Output: Validator displays 'Passwords do not match'.

Test Description: Input invalid old password and matching new passwords, tap update.
Expected Output: API returns error, EasyLoading shows error 'Incorrect current password'.

Test Description: Type correct current password, matching new passwords, and tap Update Password.
Pre-conditions: Change Password bottom sheet is open.
Expected Output: Password updates successfully, bottom sheet closes, success toast notification.

Test Description: Disconnect internet and open Profile screen.
Pre-conditions: User logged in previously, device offline.
Expected Output: Profile details (Name, Email, Phone) load immediately from local Hive storage cache.

Test Description: Tap 'Logout' row item button on Profile / settings menu.
Expected Output: Dialog opens prompting user 'Are you sure you want to log out?'.

Test Description: Tap 'Cancel' on logout dialog.
Expected Output: Dialog closes, user session remains active.

Test Description: Tap 'Logout' on logout confirmation dialog.
Expected Output: Clears Hive local storage tokens, redirects immediately back to Auth Home screen.

Test Description: Verify character limits inside edit profile name field.
Expected Output: Input limits name characters length dynamically using inputFormatters.

Test Description: Tap top-left back icon header button.
Expected Output: Returns user back to previous page index.

Test Description: Update name text field and tap Update while offline.
Pre-conditions: User modifies name field, internet offline.
Expected Output: App blocks submit, displays connection error message toast.

Test Description: Tap the Blogs menu item or routing option.
Expected Output: List of blogs loads showing blog card widgets with image, title, snippet.

Test Description: Tap on a blog post item in the blogs list.
Expected Output: Blog Details Screen opens loading full blog post text and HTML layout images.

Test Description: Inspect blog list card thumbnails.
Expected Output: Thumbnail images render cleanly or show shimmer indicators while loading from cache.

Test Description: Open blogs screen when database has 0 blogs.
Expected Output: Displays empty state UI with text 'No blogs available'.

Test Description: Tap back icon on blog details screen.
Expected Output: Navigates back to Blogs list screen smoothly.

Test Description: Pull down swipe blogs feed page list.
Expected Output: Loader indicator starts, API re-fetches blogs index.

Test Description: Verify styling of blockquotes or text formats in blog detail.
Pre-conditions: Blog content contains HTML paragraph formatting.
Expected Output: HTML is parsed correctly and fits layout dimensions cleanly.

Test Description: Scroll down blogs index bottom.
Expected Output: Fetches and displays next page of blog card entries.

Test Description: Tap share icon on blog details header.
Expected Output: Triggers native share widget displaying blog link and title.

Test Description: Open blogs screen offline.
Expected Output: Loads cached blog listings from Hive storage safely with indicator offline.

Test Description: Tap the Submit button with empty subject and message query inputs.
Expected Output: Validation errors 'Subject is required' and 'Message is required' display.

Test Description: Enter valid subject and description query and tap the Submit button.
Expected Output: Ticket gets submitted to backend database, success modal shows, fields are cleared.

Test Description: Fill query message, leave subject empty, tap submit.
Expected Output: Validator displays error 'Subject is required'.

Test Description: Fill subject, leave message field empty, tap submit.
Expected Output: Validator displays error 'Message is required'.

Test Description: Type a subject longer than 50 characters.
Expected Output: Subject input field cuts off or highlights character count limit warning.

Test Description: Tap back icon on support screen header.
Expected Output: Navigates back to dashboard profile settings page.

Test Description: Tap empty space above keyboard on support form.
Expected Output: Keyboard slides down, focus clears.

Test Description: Submit support query with very slow internet connection.
Pre-conditions: Internet speed throttled, query is submitted.
Expected Output: API times out, app shows error 'Request timeout, please try again later' safely without crashing.

Test Description: Check form fields status after successful support ticket submit.
Expected Output: Subject and Message inputs reset back to empty placeholders.

Test Description: Tap submit repeatedly after ticket is already processing.
Expected Output: Button disables, ignores all subsequent taps during API call execution.

Test Description: Open the Payment History screen.
Expected Output: List of past orders load displaying date, transaction ID, price, and status.

Test Description: Verify visual status indicators on payment list cards.
Expected Output: Completed payments show green 'Success' badge; failed payments show red 'Failed' label.

Test Description: Inspect card contents for a specific order item.
Expected Output: Card shows correct course name title, payment transaction ID, amount, and date.

Test Description: Open payment history screen for a brand new user with 0 purchases.
Pre-conditions: User has not made any purchases.
Expected Output: Displays clean empty UI state with text 'No transactions found'.

Test Description: Pull down swipe payment history list.
Expected Output: Reload indicator spinner appears, refreshes transaction logs database.

Test Description: Tap download receipt icon next to successful order (if available).
Expected Output: Triggers pdf download, progress indicator shows receipt file saved.

Test Description: Tap top-left back icon.
Expected Output: Navigates user back to profile settings page.

Test Description: Long press transaction ID text to copy.
Expected Output: Transaction ID copies to clipboard, toast confirms 'Copied to clipboard'.

Test Description: Scroll down transaction history index.
Expected Output: Loads next pages of transaction records successfully.

Test Description: Open history screen while device is offline.
Expected Output: Loads cached history log entries from local Hive storage cleanly.

Test Description: Tap on the Certificates option in drawer/settings.
Pre-conditions: User is logged in, has completed courses.
Expected Output: List of earned certificates loads with course name, date, and share actions.

Test Description: Click the download icon next to an earned certificate.
Expected Output: File downloader service triggers, certificate PDF saves to device storage.

Test Description: Deny device storage permission when downloading a certificate.
Pre-conditions: User selects certificate, permission is requested and denied.
Expected Output: App displays clean message: 'Allow storage permission to download certificate' or opens settings.

Test Description: Tap download icon when storage permission is not yet granted.
Expected Output: Triggers native OS storage write permission dialog overlay.

Test Description: Select Allow on storage permission dialog popup.
Expected Output: Permission is saved, file starts downloading instantly.

Test Description: Check downloader notification progress bar during file write.
Expected Output: Notification drawer displays active file download progress percentage (e.g. 50%... 100%).

Test Description: Open native file manager and check downloaded certificate pdf exists.
Expected Output: Certificate file exists inside Downloads directory, fits size specifications.

Test Description: Tap share icon next to certificate item.
Expected Output: Triggers native share utility sheet allowing user to send PDF via Email/WhatsApp.

Test Description: Tap on certificate card item to view preview.
Expected Output: PDF viewer screen opens, displaying image preview of custom completion certificate.

Test Description: Navigate to Certificate screen for a user who hasn't completed any course.
Expected Output: Displays empty state layout showing 'Complete your courses to earn certificates'.

Test Description: Tap top-left back icon on Certificates screen.
Expected Output: Navigates back to profile settings page.

Test Description: Swipe down certificates list page.
Expected Output: Re-triggers API to fetch latest certificate index list.

Test Description: Swipe down notification, click cancel on active certificate download.
Expected Output: Download processes terminate, partial file is deleted, status displays cancelled.

Test Description: Attempt download when device memory space is full.
Expected Output: Downloader fails, displays toast message warning 'Insufficient storage space'.

Test Description: Tap completed download notification banner.
Expected Output: App opens file directly inside native PDF viewer application of device.

Test Description: Tap the notification bell icon on the top bar.
Expected Output: Screen displays list of push notifications with content, title, and timestamp.

Test Description: Tap on a push notification banner in the notifications list.
Pre-conditions: User has notifications loaded in list.
Expected Output: App redirects user directly to the relevant course details or blog detail page.

Test Description: Verify unread notification badge count indicator on Dashboard Home.
Pre-conditions: User has 3 unread notifications in system.
Expected Output: Bell icon shows red circle badge displaying digits count '3' on header.

Test Description: Tap on an unread notification list card item.
Pre-conditions: List item background has unread tint color highlight.
Expected Output: Item background tint clears indicating Read state; home badge count decreases by 1.

Test Description: Tap 'Clear All' or double check icon inside notification screen header.
Expected Output: All notifications disappear, displays list empty placeholder screen.

Test Description: Swipe left on a notification list item card.
Expected Output: Dismissible triggers, item slides out of screen, deletes from list.

Test Description: Open notification screen when there are 0 logs.
Expected Output: Displays illustrative empty placeholder with text 'No new notifications'.

Test Description: Tap back icon on notification screen header.
Expected Output: Navigates back to Dashboard Home tab.

Test Description: Trigger push notification while app is active in foreground.
Pre-conditions: App is open on Home page.
Expected Output: Top slider notification banner overlay displays, badge count updates dynamically.

Test Description: Trigger notification when app is minimized.
Expected Output: System tray shows app icon notifications badge alert, tapping routes to notification screen.

Test Description: Disconnect internet connection and launch the app or perform navigation.
Expected Output: App displays offline placeholder or error banner alerting 'No internet connection'.

Test Description: Re-enable internet connection while remaining on offline warning screen.
Expected Output: Warning message disappears, active screen automatically triggers retry and refreshes.

Test Description: Toggle the theme mode switch (Dark/Light) from settings/profile.
Pre-conditions: User is logged in on settings/dashboard.
Expected Output: App visual theme swaps instantly (light to dark or vice versa) across all screens.
Remarks: Checks Hive configuration storage and Provider.

Test Description: Change the application locale in language configuration menu.
Expected Output: App text headers and body labels dynamically switch translations instantly.

Test Description: Change device system accessibility font sizes to Extra Large.
Pre-conditions: System accessibility text settings set to large scale.
Expected Output: App text scales dynamically or caps bounds safely to prevent label overlaps.

Test Description: Minimize app for 5 minutes during dashboard view, then restore.
Expected Output: App opens back to dashboard without restarting login screens sequence.

Test Description: Launch app when storage is extremely full.
Expected Output: App handles Hive write errors gracefully without crashing or freezing UI.
Remarks: Checks DB file write failure tolerance.

Test Description: Launch app on device with camera punch hole / screen notch.
Expected Output: AppBar and headers respect SafeArea, elements do not clip behind notch.

Test Description: Open app in split-screen mode next to another application.
Expected Output: App view scales correctly, elements remain legible, scrolling operates smoothly.

Test Description: Trigger a deep-link with corrupted route query parameters.
Expected Output: App redirects safely to Splash/Dashboard home, ignoring bad path queries.

Test Description: Attempt to logout while offline.
Expected Output: App destroys local session, routes to Auth Home instantly (offline session clear).

Test Description: Trigger a server API response indicating 'Token Expired' status code 401.
Pre-conditions: User is on dashboard, local token is expired.
Expected Output: App intercepts 401 error, clears local Hive keys, shows alert, routes back to login.

Test Description: Verify version check prompt on startup when backend reports deprecated version.
Expected Output: Display forced-update warning modal block, directing user to Play/App Store.

Test Description: Deny camera permission on photo pick, verify recovery option.
Pre-conditions: Profile photo change is tapped, camera permission set to Deny.
Expected Output: App display alert dialog redirecting user to Settings to grant camera permissions.
